Deng Ju й„§еЏҐ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Ju (й„§еЏҐ). Sent by Sun Xiu to gather peacocks but demands provoked Lu Xing into revolt. Deng Ju was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Deng Ju lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
